title: Proboscis Monkey Villager
description: Bring a playful twist to Minecraft with this resource pack that transforms villagers into proboscis monkeys, complete with unique skins and sounds. Enjoy a fresh, humorous interaction with your in-game villagers!
body: ![Proboscis Monkey Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5267313eedb296a877909393ece3d706c8fb3a28.png)Transform your Minecraft world with this entertaining resource pack that turns villagers into proboscis monkeys. This pack changes the default villager skins to the distinctive features of proboscis monkeys, known for their long noses and expressive faces. Additionally, the usual villager sounds are replaced with monkey-like noises, adding a humorous and novel interaction to your gameplay. Whether you're trading, building, or exploring, these quirky villagers will bring a smile to your face and a fresh twist to your adventures. Perfect for players seeking to add a lighthearted and unique element to their Minecraft experience.
